description: This email template is a perfect blend of professionalism and creativity, ideal for those in the Business Services sector, specifically for promoting various print services. The design features a two-column layout, providing ample space for text and images. The color scheme is a soothing combination of blue, green, and white, with a hint of rainbow hues to add a dash of vibrance. The light background enhances readability, while the paper-like texture gives it a tactile feel. The template is versatile enough to promote a range of print services, from simple document printing to high-quality poster prints. Its visually appealing design is sure to capture the attention of your audience.
short_description: Elevate your business communication with this versatile email template. Combining cool blue and green tones on a clean white background, this design effectively showcases your print services. Perfect for service promotion, its light, airy aesthetic captures attention while a rainbow element adds creativity. Promote new paper products or print services with vibrant visuals and engaging content.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
